The '''Seltiss-1 caravel''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] transport vessel.<ref name="FEUD" />

==Characteristics==
A fair representative of a "typical" caravel, the Seltiss-1 was a roomy shuttle generally used to transport [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] from [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] - though some were used to patrol worlds on which their owners maintained a strong presence.<ref name="FEUD" />

Like most caravels, the Seltiss-1 tended to lack a [[hyperdrive]], had concealed weapons, and included a detachable room that served as an [[escape pod]], with each caravel having its own unique appearance; though the [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] models tended to emulate the shape of [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barges]].<ref name="FEUD" />

Ultimately the Seltiss-1 was measured thirty meters in length and was able to carry sixty-five passengers and one hundred and fifty metric tons of cargo.<ref name="FEUD" /> The crew complement numbered five, including up to three gunners, who were in command of the vessel's four [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher and a [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|tractor beam projector]].<ref name="FEUD" />

It was succeeded by the [[Seltiss-2 caravel|Seltiss-2 model]], also produced by Ubrikkian.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
